feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MDG Consolidation using BP SOA service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one question on MDG Consolidation process. We have 5 ECC source systems from where we need to load the vendor data(BP) into MDG Hub on S/4 HANA. I am trying to know how to use MDG Consolidation in this scenario using BP SOAP webservice. I have gone through a few blogs(Consolidation with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA page 41 and 42) but things are not clear.

It would be a great help if any of you could provide me with any comprehensive step by step document or any other help so that, it can help me figure out the final approach on the consolidation strategy from the said multiple ECC source systems.

I am trying to understand the following:

1) How will SOAP webservice trigger the consolidation steps automatically?

2) Is there any external system(any ETL tool) which will have to be deployed here to create the SOA message payload after extracting vendor data from the multiple source systems and publish that SOA payload for MDG/S4 HANA system to consume to trigger MDG Consolidation steps?

3) How will the data extraction take place from multiple source systems in this scenario?  

4) Is there any background job to be scheduled at MDG side which will read the SOA payload and trigger the MDG Consolidation steps?

5) In this case, will SOA payload populate all the Consolidation Source tables?

Any pointer in this regard would be much appreciated.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Ship to party
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Public cloud; There are multiple Ship-To Parties for a single customer how can we upload them without maintaining manually, one by one, against each Sold-To Party?

To explain further: let's say Customer A has 20 Ship-To Parties. How can we upload them efficiently and save time? I’ve already uploaded 100+ Ship-To Parties into the system, but now assigning each one individually to the corresponding Sold-To Party feels like a very time-consuming task.

Is there no shortcut or quicker method to assign these Ship-To Parties in bulk?

Best regards,

entry.title: New company code as a copy of an old one
entry.content:
Hello, I have been trying to create a new company code, using an old one as a template. Any way that I can copy the company details + pricing conditions and all facilities to a new one? We are moving to a new currency, Bulgaria changes to Euro and we need to set up our systems good. 


Thank you for your answer,
Nikola Nikolov

entry.title: SAP MDG Parallel processing in Mass processing of data
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We have a requirement to configure Consolidation and mass processing using Change Request for client, version 2023. For mass process, they have requirement to process multiple CRs for same entity ( which I understand is parallel processing). However when I am creating configID for activation of material using CR, I cannot select my CR type(which is configured for parallel processing). I am using copy of CR type MATL0A, Business Activity MATA. Kindly guide how can I achieve this requirement of activating material with CR for mass processing using parallel processing.

Thank you,

Shweta

entry.title: BRF+ in SAP MDG: Unable to get BP Central Data fields while adding condition in validation rule.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am configuring a Validation using BRF+ in SAP MDG for the Business Partner (BP) data model.

I am using the standard function CHECK_BP_CENTRL under the application FMDM_MODEL_BP for validations. However, while trying to define a rule condition, I’m unable to find the Central Data fields in the context (but Change Request Type is available).

What I’ve done:

  • Created a Rule Set and Rule under Check Entity for BP.

  • Assigned the function CHECK_BP_CENTRL.

  • When trying to define a condition by creating a rule under Assigned Ruleset, I opened the Context Query, but Central data fields of BP are not available.

Screenshot attached for clarity. 

 

How can I make sure that the BP Central Data fields are available in the BRF+ context? 

Any documentation links, screenshots, or guidance from your experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: Extend S/4HANA Material Master with Custom Fields and Transfer to Decentralized EWM Product Master
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm working with SAP S/4HANA and a decentralized SAP EWM system. My requirement is to add custom fields to the material master in S/4HANA (e.g., MARA or MARC level), and ensure that these custom fields are transferred to the product master in decentralized EWM.

So far, I understand that:

  1. We can use Custom Fields and Logic (SCFD) or append structures to extend the material master in S/4HANA.

  2. The material master is sent to EWM via DRF (Data Replication Framework).

My questions are:

  • What is the recommended approach to ensure that the custom fields are included in the replication from S/4HANA to decentralized EWM?

  • Do we need to enhance the DRF or is there a BAdI or enhancement in DRF that supports transferring these custom fields?

  • On the EWM side, how can we ensure that the custom fields are visible in the product master ?

Any best practices, sample BAdIs, or links to SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: could not find Entity for Unit of Measure grp(MEGRP) in MM Data Model
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone help on this field Unit of Measure grp(MEGRP). I cannot find it in MM Data Model. If its not available, where can I find in database tables to extend the data model.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: DRF IDocs Issue
entry.content:
Hello !

I'm currently working on implementing Data Replication Framework (DRF) in SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) for data replication between two systems:

SENDER SYSTEM: S46 (200)

RECEIVER SYSTEM: S41 (106)

Sender system

Receiver system

I have completed all the configurations. The data are not getting replicated in the receiver system. 

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

entry.title: Distribution of customer to lower environments. Production to Quality
entry.content:
We have a requirement where we have to Distribute production data (customers) to quality system.

The approach we followed is by DRF. The IDOCs are now successfully reaching the quality system but now we have to create a process code in order to handle the IDOC. 

We were planning to create a FM in which we will map each field in IDOC segment to standard tables like KNA1, KNVV, KNVK etc. This will take time and will not be efficient for large number of IDOCs. 

Please let me know the correct approach for this situation?

entry.title: Control records for actual CCS missing for valuation area 1710.
entry.content:
hello,

i am trying to create the accounting view of new material via mm01 but system is showing me below error in CoCd 1710, Plant 1710.

if i am trying to save it without any Accounting view then system is letting me save it without any error.

otherwise below error is shown;

please note that the valuation area is already active in the system as per attached images.

"Control records for actual CCS missing for valuation area 1710."

Message No. ML4HMASTER229

Diagnosis

The system detected missing control records for the actual cost component split in database tables CKMLKEV or CKMLKEVLD. Usually, such missing control records indicate that you activated the actual cost component split for the valuation area but have not yet run the startup program for the actual cost component split. However, the control records could also be missing due to errors in the period shift program (transaction MMPV).

System Response

You cannot make any postings for the valuation area before the missing control records have been generated.

Procedure

If the control records for the actual cost component split are missing because you subsequently activated the actual cost component split for the given valuation area without running the startup report FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP, then please execute the report FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP now. Once all relevant materials and activity types of the valuation area have been processed successfully in update mode by the program (check the message log!), the missing control records in table CKMLKEV or CKMLKEVLD will be generated.

If you did not subsequently activate the actual cost component split for the given valuation area, then please do not execute the report FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP but get in contact with SAP support!

entry.title: Re: Control records for actual CCS missing for valuation...
entry.content:
hello,

check the period for MM in MMPV first, that the relevant posting period is open.

then in screen of SE38, run the report "FCML4H_CCS_STARTUP".

this will definitely fix the issue.

entry.title: SAP MDG Certificate
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm taking the Learning Journey for SAP MDG (MDG100 and MDG200). I have no background in SAP MDG except for Material Master Data. I took the test and failed.

My question is, are there additional resources out there, besides the virtual classroom, that can help me with the test and better understand the content? Any studying tips? Videos that are according to SAP teaching would help me a lot. I appreciate any help you can provide.

entry.title: Major bug in SAP. We do not need SP Key rather we should have source plant and destination field
entry.content: Currently SP Key field in MRP 2 in MM03 is created unnecessarily since we do not have any field called source plant and destination plant in S4 Hana. There are lot of problems for creation of SP key which is unique to company based on source plant and destination plant. For every new plant transfer, new SP key needs to be created and maintained. SAP has created this problem. Instead for every material, source plant and destination plant fields should have been given in MRP 2 view in MM03.

entry.title: SAP S4 : customer master main address in Japanese or Chinese / Compare to English
entry.content:
Hi , We have Sales Org's all over the world , and operate in one instance of SAP . In SAP S/4 , should the customer master main address be in Japanese or Chinese / Compare to Latin characters set ?  Or the other way around ?

Example : Sales Org's JP01 - Japan and CN01 - China , interact with the local customers and vendor in the local language .

The main usage of Latin characters to be set for all customer is to perform a SAP GTS check and some corporate reporting so we understand the customer / vendor  name .

Any OSS note or guidance will be welcome as we want to leverage SAP S4 . Thank you

entry.title: MDG Mass Processing Address Usage Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We are upgrading our MDG system version to S/4 HANA 2023 and we've encountered a problem during the mass processing of Business Partner.

We have understood that the entity BP_ADDUSG has been replaced by BP_ADUSTD in the data model. Currently, both entities are active in our system. In the UI, the new entity BP_ADUSTD is correctly populated and displayed.

However, when we import data using the Excel file in a consolidation/mass process scenario, the system still writes data to the old entity BP_ADDUSG. As a result, after the Change Request is created, we do not see the data in the expected section, and we encounter an error due to the absence of the required data.

Additionally, we receive a warning message indicating that an obsolete method is being called, likely triggered after the data is written to BP_ADDUSG.

Our main question is:
How can we ensure that the data is written to the correct entity, BP_ADUSTD?
Is there a specific mapping or customizing setting that allows us to control this behavior?

Even when values are not explicitly provided in the input file, the system continues to derive and populate the old entity as it did prior to the upgrade. We suspect this behavior may be linked to the mass processing logic or data import framework (Excel/Web Service), which might still reference the old entity.

Any guidance or documentation you can provide to help us correctly redirect the data to BP_ADUSTD would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Update customer hierarchy if change in rebate or price relevance
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

Update customer hierarchy if change in rebate or price relevance in SAP tcode XD02.

Anybody familiar with this error.

Thanks,

newcloudguy

entry.title: deleted custom configuration from component FPM_FORM_UIBB_GL2 but it remains in WDY_CONF_USER table
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I've created a custom configuration YMDG_IN_SUP_TAXFLDS to make custom fields visible on the NWBC UIBB using the customizing option. Later, I deleted the configuration ID from the component FPM_FORM_UIBB_GL2 but it remains in WDY_CONF_USER/ WDY_CONF_USERT/WDY_CONF_USERT2 tables which resulting dumps when accessing NWBC as the system is trying to access the feeder class associated to the custom configuration. 


Checked the configurations using the program /BOFU/R_WD_COMP_CONF_WUL but couldn't find the custom configuration which means it doesn't exists.
I've tried clearing the cache using program /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES, WDR_CFG_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA.
Data Model cache cleared using /n/iwfnd/cache_cleanup. I've explored the below notes as well, but no use

1538629 - Report for deleting personalizations in cProjects
2574964 - Replication of Web Dynpro User Interface Customizing from Client 000 to Destination Client - SAP for Me

https://me.sap.com/notes/2877675/E

Can I delete the table entries manually, or do we have any alternative to adjust this?

Appreciate your inputs, Thank you 🙂

entry.title: MDG Filter Search Help of Characteristic Value
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP MDG on an S/4 HANA 2023 system, is it possible to filter the search help of a characteristic in "Lean Classification" management?

For example, if in the list of characteristics there is MDM_MOTHER_CODE with a specific value, I need to filter the values for the characteristic MDM_DM_CALIBRO based on the value of the MDM_MOTHER_CODE.

Where do I need to make changes?

Thank you

entry.title: Change of feeder class name in SAP MDG for BP
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have a small doubt as below and suggest me the same. Thanks.

1. We have a custom uibb where we kept the custom feeder class

2. For checking standard behaviour, we replaced the custom feeder class to standard feeder class

3. Again, we changed the standard feeder class to custom feeder class

post that , New button was not working. When we click on the NEW button system hangs .

I checked the feeder class parameters/setting.

Is there any other settings do i need to carry?

Kindly suggest me the same. thanks.

entry.title: How to Read Data In Mass Process/Consolidation Using Validation BADI MDG
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We got a simple requirement to read company code is initial or not based on Customer roles (FLCU00) , For Single Process its working as expected using IT_DATA ( Reading roles) and using READ_CHAR_VALUE ( Read Company Code exist or not)

But for Mass Process we are unable to fetch Company code using READ_CHAR_VALUE  during validation step of Consolidation.

Any solution?
